query:
INSERT INTO students (name, yearGroup, age, avatarColour, active) VALUES
  ('Samson', 7, 12, '#7C3AED', 'yes'),
  ('Apollo', 6, 11, '#0891B2', 'yes');

INSERT INTO student_settings (studentId, mathsFocusAreas, englishWritingStyles, questionCount, additionalNotes) VALUES
  (1, '["Mental Arithmetic","Fractions","Algebra","Geometry","Word Problems"]',
      '["Blog Post","Persuasive Letter","Descriptive Writing","Narrative Story"]',
      20, 'Samson is in Year 7, age 12. Focus on building confidence with algebra and written explanations.'),
  (2, '["Number Bonds","Multiplication","Division","Fractions","Measurement"]',
      '["Blog Post","Instructional Writing","Review","Descriptive Writing"]',
      15, 'Apollo is in Year 6, age 11. Focus on consolidating times tables and creative descriptive language.');
